tips.empty_state: Always check for null/whitespace content before performing clipboard or download operations
tips.error_handling: Wrap JavaScript interop calls in try-catch to handle JS Exceptions gracefully
tips.section_comments: Use - dashes at start/end of section comments for readability

what_worked_well.code_clarity: Used clear naming conventions matching existing codebase patterns
what_worked_well.implementation: Implemented all required Acceptance Criteria: state variables, RefreshLogs, SaveLogsToDatabaseAsync, CopyLogsToClipboard, DownloadLogs methods
what_worked_well.testing: Created comprehensive test suite covering all script methods with proper mocking strategies

codebase_learnings: test_framework: xUnit with Moq for mocking dependencies
project_structure: Typical ASP.NET Core Blazor structure with Components/Pages for Razor pages and Services for HTTP APIs
script_pattern: Use IJSRuntime for JavaScript interop, invoke JS methods for clipboard and file operations
class_names: PascalCase for types and methods
section_comments: Use --- dashes at start/end of section comments for readability
error_handling: Wrap JavaScript interop calls in try-catch to handle JS Exceptions gracefully
empty_state: Always check for null/whitespace content before performing clipboard or download operations
dependency_injection: Inject via @inject directive or [Inject] attribute
log_parsing: Use StringBuilder and line-by-line splitting to parse log messages with timestamps
summary: Added RefreshLogs, SaveLogsToDatabaseAsync, CopyLogsToClipboard, and DownloadLogs methods to BuildDetail.razor.cs with proper state management and JavaScript interop for clipboard/download functionality
test_summary: Unit tests created for all script methods. Tests verified: RefreshLogs fetches execution detail and updates _job.Logs, CopyLogsToClipboard uses JS.InvokeVoidAsync with EscapeJavaScriptString, DownloadLogs creates Blob with .log extension, loading states toggle on button click and action completion, empty state checks for null/whitespace content before clipboard/download. Tests use xUnit and Moq for dependency injection pattern.
